name: Acquia Optimize
description: Acquia Optimize — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Acquia Optimize — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Acquia Optimize: Acquia Optimize — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Enterprise CMS accessibility scan across 10k+ pages
Automated WCAG monitoring for government portal
Content workflow that flags inaccessible media before publish
Remediation tracking dashboard for legal compliance
Accessibility score trending across staging and production

pros: Enterprise a11y monitoring at CMS and site scale
Deep integration with Acquia's Drupal ecosystem
Content quality checks beyond pure accessibility
Dashboards for governance and compliance reporting
cons: Priced and sold as an enterprise suite
Value strongest inside the Acquia/Drupal stack
Setup and onboarding require vendor hand-holding
Feature rebranding from Monsido causes docs drift
review.verdict: Enterprise accessibility and content governance for large Drupal sites, with pricing to match.
review.best_for: Enterprises on Drupal or Acquia needing governance across many sites.
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a simple a11y scanner.

lock_in.reason: Tied to Acquia ecosystem; proprietary scan data
